title: helichrysum bakeri
intro: Helichrysum bakeri, also known as the yellow curry plant or yellow bush, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the island of Réunion in the Indian Ocean and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum bakeri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried flowers for use in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
